<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band13_chunk004.pdf#page=22 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band13 p192 -->

EICHSTÄTT STADTRESIDENZ


== FICHSTÄTT STADTRESIDENZ ==



[[File:Band13_chunk004_p022_img001.jpg|thumb|Phaethon, Ausschnitt aus dem Treppenhausfresko]]



[[File:Band13_chunk004_p022_img002.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band13 p193 -->
